title: Golden Globe Awards 2026: Closing Odds and Results Summary
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards took place January 11, 2026, at the Beverly Hilton in Beverly Hills, hosted by Nikki Glaser. The evening proved largely predictable, with "all but two of the 11 major film categories" going to betting favorites. Best Motion Picture - Musical or Comedy: One Battle After Another dominated decisively at -1000 odds, winning as expected. Best Motion Picture - Drama: Hamnet (+130) upset favorite Sinners (-155), providing one of few surprises of the night. Best Motion Picture - Animated: KPop Demon Hunters cruised to victory at -900 odds. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson won for One Battle After Another, cementing his Oscar frontrunner status. Best Supporting Actress: Teyana Taylor (+135) delivered the evening's biggest upset over favored Amy Madigan. Best Cinematic and Box Office Achievement: Sinners claimed this honor at -320 odds. The predictable nature of results suggests minimal surprises ahead for the March 15 Academy Awards, as "top sportsbooks...absolutely nailed the odds this time around."
